Functional biochemical assay to identify treatments for viral infectious disease that targets Dengue virus type 2 NS2B-NS3 protease. Utilizing a direct enzyme activity measurement method, reading the fluorescence intensity is used to characterize the relative potency of inhibitors as IC50. Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kqdg32m87v25/v1

Synthetic construct has been made based on Dengue virus type 2 (strain Thailand/16681/1984) by Centre for Medicines Discovery, University of Oxford, and the assay has been performed by Weizmann Institute of Science.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7yebkgwz/v3
